title: Sales Performance Dashboard
summary: An interactive dashboard tracking regional sales performance, built to give a sales team a single view of trends and outliers.
problem: Regional sales data was scattered across spreadsheets with no consistent way to compare performance month to month.
approach: Consolidated data into a single SQL warehouse table, then built a Power BI dashboard with drill-downs by region, product line, and rep.
results: Reduced manual reporting time by an estimated 5 hours/week and surfaced two underperforming regions that were previously hidden in aggregate totals.
